name: Home Run
description:
Home Run is a baseball game focused solely on batting. The core gameplay loop revolves around timing and power. The player controls a batter facing a pitcher. The pitcher throws a variety of pitches at varying speeds and locations within the strike zone. The player's goal is to hit the ball and ideally, hit a home run. The game tracks stats such as batting average, home runs, and total hits. 

The game features a single-player mode where the player progresses through increasingly difficult pitchers. The difficulty scales through pitch speed, accuracy and the variety of pitch types thrown by the pitcher. There is also a practice mode where the player can endlessly face pitches to improve their timing. A scoring system awards points based on the distance the ball travels after being hit and multipliers can be obtained by hitting the ball with perfect timing. The angle of the bat at the moment of impact will affect the trajectory of the ball. 

There are no fielding, base running, or pitching components. The game continues until a set number of outs are reached or the player chooses to end the game. A leaderboard tracks the highest scores achieved in the single-player mode.

controls.arrow_left: Moves the batter's stance slightly to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Moves the batter's stance slightly to the right.
controls.arrow_up: Raises the bat, preparing for a swing with increased power potential.
controls.arrow_down: Lowers the bat, preparing for a swing with increased accuracy.
controls.space: Initiates the swing. The timing of the swing relative to the ball's location determines the quality of the hit.
controls.shift: Modifies the swing to be a bunt. This allows the player to sacrifice power for a higher chance to make contact.
controls.q: Adjusts the aiming point of the swing towards the upper-left of the strike zone.
controls.e: Adjusts the aiming point of the swing towards the upper-right of the strike zone.
controls.z: Adjusts the aiming point of the swing towards the lower-left of the strike zone.
controls.c: Adjusts the aiming point of the swing towards the lower-right of the strike zone.
